About Me

Hello, I go by Andy.

I am double majoring in biomedical engineering and applied math & statistics at Johns Hopkins University. Within biomedical engineering, my focus area is computational biology. I am interested in exploring the interface at which computer science and medicine meet.

I enjoy playing card games (nertz, kemps, Napoleon, poker), strategy games (Mafia, Avalon), and figuring out lifehacks.
